主要发现 (top_findings).摘要 (summary): Promotes unsafe installation via curl-pipe-bash from an external domain (canifi.com) without verification, risking arbitrary code execution.
Skill claims extensive Apple News integration capabilities but provides no executable code in artifacts, making verification impossible.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Claims capabilities: personalized_feed, channel_following, news_plus_access, offline_reading, audio_stories

主要发现 (top_findings).摘要 (summary): Skill description claims 'system-level Apple ID authentication' and 'credentials never transmitted', but configuration collects raw APPLE_ID and APPLE_PASSWORD environment variables, creating a contradictory and misleading privacy promise.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Requires APPLE_ID and APPLE_PASSWORD environment variables

主要发现 (top_findings).摘要 (summary): Instructs users to store sensitive Apple ID credentials in a local tool (canifi-env) without detailing security controls, access boundaries, or encryption.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Instructions: 'canifi-env set APPLE_ID "your_apple_id"' and 'canifi-env set APPLE_PASSWORD "your_password"'

遗漏项 (missed_items).原因 (why): No Python, JavaScript, or other executable code files present in artifacts; cannot analyze actual skill implementation or verify credential usage.
External repository mentioned in configuration; may contain source code not included in artifacts, needed to verify implementation.
External script referenced in curl-pipe-bash command; needed to verify download-and-execute payload.
